title: Cosmetic Preservative Efficacy Testing Specification
product: Aqueous Cosmetic Cream - Preservative System Validation
factory: Shanghai Cosmetic Testing Center Co., Ltd.

acceptance_criteria.notes: USP <51> Category 2 for S. aureus, E. coli, P. aeruginosa
USP <51> Category 2: Day 28 count must not exceed Day 14 count

acceptance_criteria.parameter: Yeast/Mold no increase at Day 14 and Day 28
acceptance_criteria.notes: USP <51> Category 2 for C. albicans, A. brasiliensis

acceptance_criteria.parameter: ISO 11930 Criterion A - Bacteria Day 7 log reduction
acceptance_criteria.notes: Stricter EU criterion for bacteria at Day 7

acceptance_criteria.parameter: ISO 11930 Criterion A - Yeast/Mold Day 7 log reduction
acceptance_criteria.notes: EU criterion for C. albicans and A. brasiliensis at Day 7

disposition_rules.pass: USP <51> Category 2 criteria met for all 5 organisms AND ISO 11930 Criterion A or B met
disposition_rules.conditional: USP <51> passed but ISO 11930 Criterion A failed / Criterion B passed -- acceptable for US market only, re-formulate for EU
disposition_rules.fail: Any organism fails USP <51> Category 2 criteria -- formulation rejected, reformulation required
